title: Ozempic row: Delhi HC seeks government reply over delay in off-label drug misuse probe
summary: In a significant move, the Delhi High Court has summoned the government and drug regulatory bodies to address a contempt petition regarding the use of diabetes medications, including Ozempic, as weight loss aids. Authorities have been given a four-week period...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
